source: pred.gg public profile + own aggregate baselines

archetype.label: The Wanderer
archetype.receipt: top three heroes are only 36% of 724 games — spreading games this thin slows the climb in every queue.

entries.change: Move your midlane games to carry
Queue carry instead of your average mix
entries.receipt: 53.2% there vs 51.4% overall, 160 games of evidence

ledger.note: wins per 100 games spent on each change; entries overlap and do not sum

plan: Queue carry as primary. It is your best role at 53.2% over 160 games (your overall is 51.4%). Set carry as secondary, not the other way around.
Your champion pool is 10+ heroes wide and your top three are only 36% of your games. Gold-to-Platinum climbs are almost always pool-narrowing stories: aim for 70%+ of games on your top three.
The math: you are at 595 VP; Platinum III starts at 900. Your all-time peak is 824.
honesty: personal winrates are shrunk toward your own average (small heater samples do not count as mains)
field baselines are all-ranks aggregates from our current-patch match sample, not Gold-bracket-specific yet
winrate edges are observational; they say where you win, not why

insights.title: Goldilocks324 brings out your best
insights.finding: Your record alongside Goldilocks324 is 56% over 193 ranked games — your strongest pairing in the stack. When only two of you queue, make it this one.

insights.title: For the group chat
insights.finding: 2 pentakills in real 5v5s and a 21-kill spree (plus 18 more in ARAM and brawls — the group chat can rule on whether those count). Cuban has receipts.

insights.title: Your lean, relative to the squad: objective damage
insights.finding: Cuban's profile sits mid-pack on most axes; the clearest lean is objective damage at 1.1x the squad average. Steady is a style too — the lineup can build around predictability.
